window_summary: This window tracks the recent Raphire/Win11Debloat release stream, covering a series of updates from mid-2025 through mid-2026. The releases introduce new customization options, bug fixes, a graphical user interface, and expanded system tweak capabilities for Windows 11 debloating.

chunks.title: Release 2025.06.11
chunks.raw_text:

chunks.title: Release 2025.06.12
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Raphire/Win11Debloat
Release: Release 2025.06.12
Tag: 2025.06.12; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-06-12T20:06:31Z; created_at: 2025-06-12T20:05:44Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* Added option to enable dark mode
* Added option to disable transparency effects
* Added option to disable animations and visual effects, requested in #120
* Added option to disable start menu mobile devices integration
* Fixed some settings not being set immediately when run as other user, reported in #255
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/compare/2025.06.11...2025.06.12
<hr/>
[![GitHub Downloads (specific asset, specific tag)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/Raphire/Win11Debloat/2025.06.12/Get.ps1?label=Downloads&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/wiki/How-To-Use)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat release 2025.06.12, new options are added to enable dark mode, disable transparency effects, disable animations and visual effects, and disable start menu mobile devices integration. It also fixes some settings not being set immediately when run as another user.

chunks.title: Release 2025.08.16
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Raphire/Win11Debloat
Release: Release 2025.08.16
Tag: 2025.08.16; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-08-16T00:04:53Z; created_at: 2025-08-16T00:03:53Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* Add option to disable telemetry, ads, MSN news feed and AI in Microsoft Edge
* Add time-out to System Restore Point creation, to prevent script from getting stuck as suggested in #289
* Fix: Add missing key from Disable Paint AI Sysprep/Undo files
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/compare/2025.08.01...2025.08.16
<hr/>
[![GitHub Downloads (specific asset, specific tag)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/Raphire/Win11Debloat/2025.08.16/Get.ps1?label=Downloads&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/wiki/How-To-Use)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat release 2025.08.16, an option to disable telemetry, ads, MSN news feed, and AI in Microsoft Edge is added. A time-out for System Restore Point creation is introduced, and a missing key for Disable Paint AI Sysprep/Undo files is fixed.

chunks.title: Release 2025.09.07
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Raphire/Win11Debloat
Release: Release 2025.09.07
Tag: 2025.09.07; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-09-07T17:27:07Z; created_at: 2025-09-07T17:26:51Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* Disable Modern Standby networking to prevent battery drain by @SashankBhamidi in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/288
* Add DisableBackupNotifications parameter by @SashankBhamidi in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/297
* Update wording around DisableWidgets feature by @Raphire, suggested by @JohannesK71083 in #302
* Fix dark mode not applying correctly in Sysprep mode by @Raphire
* Fix script not using correct user directory paths when run as system account by @Raphire, reported by @soccerzockt in #310
## New Contributors
* @SashankBhamidi made their first contribution in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/288
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/compare/2025.08.16...2025.09.07
<hr/>
[![GitHub Downloads (specific asset, specific tag)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/Raphire/Win11Debloat/2025.09.07/Get.ps1?label=Downloads&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/wiki/How-To-Use)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat release 2025.09.07, Modern Standby networking is disabled to prevent battery drain, a DisableBackupNotifications parameter is added, wording around DisableWidgets is updated, dark mode in Sysprep mode is fixed, and script directory paths for system account runs are corrected.

chunks.title: Release 2025.09.13
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Raphire/Win11Debloat
Release: Release 2025.09.13
Tag: 2025.09.13; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-09-13T21:49:08Z; created_at: 2025-09-13T21:41:25Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
- Added option to not remove any apps, or remove a custom selection of apps in Default mode.
- Added `DisableRecall` feature to the Default settings.
- Disabling telemetry now also fully disables optional and required telemetry in Microsoft Edge.
- Disabling ads & suggestions in Microsoft Edge now also disables shopping assistant, error navigation suggestions and tab organization suggestions.
- Fixed missing entry for the Quick Assist app in the README.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/compare/2025.09.08...2025.09.13
<hr/>
[![GitHub Downloads (specific asset, specific tag)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/Raphire/Win11Debloat/2025.09.13/Get.ps1?label=Downloads&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/wiki/How-To-Use)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat release 2025.09.13, an option to not remove any apps or remove a custom selection in Default mode is added. The DisableRecall feature is added to default settings. Telemetry disabling now fully disables optional and required telemetry in Edge. Ads & suggestions disabling in Edge now also disables shopping assistant, error navigation suggestions, and tab organization suggestions. A missing Quick Assist app entry in the README is fixed.

chunks.title: Release 2025.09.27
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Raphire/Win11Debloat
Release: Release 2025.09.27
Tag: 2025.09.27; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-09-27T12:43:26Z; created_at: 2025-09-27T12:41:45Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* Fix issue with `Run.bat` not working correctly when username has spaces in it by @tylerhekman in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/322
* Added an option to choose combine mode for Taskbar buttons by @tsumi in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/329
* Added option to disable `Click to Do` (AI text & image analysis tool included for Copilot+ PC's) by @Raphire
* Updated Default Mode to show a list of all apps that are removed by @Raphire
* Removed prompts after system restore creation errors by @Raphire
## New Contributors
* @tylerhekman made their first contribution in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/322
* @tsumi made their first contribution in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/329
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/compare/2025.09.13...2025.09.27
<hr/>
[![GitHub Downloads (specific asset, specific tag)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/Raphire/Win11Debloat/2025.09.27/Get.ps1?label=Downloads&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/wiki/How-To-Use)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat release 2025.09.27, a fix for Run.bat with usernames containing spaces is applied. An option to choose combine mode for Taskbar buttons is added. An option to disable 'Click to Do' (AI text & image analysis tool for Copilot+ PCs) is added. Default Mode now shows a list of all removed apps. Prompts after system restore creation errors are removed.

chunks.title: Release 2025.10.06
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Raphire/Win11Debloat
Release: Release 2025.10.06
Tag: 2025.10.06; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-10-06T21:51:19Z; created_at: 2025-10-06T21:43:19Z
Release notes:
> [!Important]
> This release includes changes to the default selection of apps and the removal of the `-RemoveDevApps` command-line parameter from the script.
## What's Changed
* Added options to manage taskbar in multi-monitor mode by @tsumi in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/346
* Added Dev Home (no longer supported) and Power Automate (Rarely used) to default app selection by @Raphire
* Removed option to uninstall specific developer related apps with the `-RemoveDevApps` parameter by @Raphire
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/compare/2025.09.28...2025.10.06
<hr/>
[![GitHub Downloads (specific asset, specific tag)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/Raphire/Win11Debloat/2025.10.06/Get.ps1?label=Downloads&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/wiki/How-To-Use)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat release 2025.10.06, options to manage taskbar in multi-monitor mode are added. Dev Home and Power Automate are added to the default app selection. The -RemoveDevApps parameter is removed.

chunks.title: Release 2025.11.30
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Raphire/Win11Debloat
Release: Release 2025.11.30
Tag: 2025.11.30; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-11-30T00:36:11Z; created_at: 2025-11-30T00:31:32Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* Add NoRestartExplorer switch by @oyxnaut in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/370
* Add support for removing Microsoft 365 Business companion apps by @Raphire
* Hide the (now obsolete) option to disable start recommended section on build 26200+ by @Raphire
* Improve removal of OneDrive and Edge when run in User or Sysprep mode by @raphire based on https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/issues/366
* Add option to fully disable annoying popups after uninstalling Xbox Game Bar by @raphire based on https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/issues/367
## New Contributors
* @oyxnaut made their first contribution in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/370
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/compare/2025.10.06...2025.11.30
<hr/>
[![GitHub Downloads (specific asset, specific tag)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/Raphire/Win11Debloat/2025.11.30/Get.ps1?label=Downloads&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/wiki/How-To-Use)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat release 2025.11.30, a NoRestartExplorer switch is added. Support for removing Microsoft 365 Business companion apps is added. The option to disable start recommended section is hidden on build 26200+. Removal of OneDrive and Edge in User or Sysprep mode is improved. An option to fully disable annoying popups after uninstalling Xbox Game Bar is added.

chunks.title: Release 2025.12.16
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Raphire/Win11Debloat
Release: Release 2025.12.16
Tag: 2025.12.16; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-12-16T22:26:30Z; created_at: 2025-12-16T22:25:17Z
Release notes:
This release is focussed on fixing a few bugs and cleaning up the main script to improve overall readability.
## What's Changed
* Added option to disable Game Bar Integration in Default Mode, based on #367 & #386
* Removed Windows 10 specific app removal logic in #394, this was originally added as a workaround for W10 specific issues
* Fixed issue that, under certain circumstances, caused changes to be applied before creating a restore point in #394
* Fixed some default parameters not being applied correctly when running the script with both the `-RunDefaults`/`-RunDefaultsLite` and `-Silent` parameters in #394
* Fixed script not exiting correctly when not selecting any options in Custom Mode
* Fixed issue with `Disable Give access to` feature also disabling share tab in folder properties, based on #390
* Updated `Get.ps1` to always fetch latest release, instead of using a hardcoded release version, based on suggestion by @agadiffe in #381
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/compare/2025.11.30...2025.12.16
<hr/>
[![GitHub Downloads (specific asset, specific tag)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/Raphire/Win11Debloat/2025.12.16/Get.ps1?label=Downloads&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/wiki/How-To-Use)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat release 2025.12.16, an option to disable Game Bar Integration in Default Mode is added. Windows 10 specific app removal logic is removed. A fix ensures changes are applied after creating a restore point. Default parameters with -RunDefaults/-RunDefaultsLite and -Silent are fixed. Script exit when no options are selected in Custom Mode is fixed. The 'Disable Give access to' feature no longer disables the share tab in folder properties. Get.ps1 is updated to always fetch the latest release.

chunks.title: Release 2025.12.29
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Raphire/Win11Debloat
Release: Release 2025.12.29
Tag: 2025.12.29; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-12-29T01:25:49Z; created_at: 2025-12-29T00:03:14Z
Release notes:
> [!IMPORTANT]
> Please be advised that several undocumented parameters in Win11Debloat are now deprecated and will be removed in the next release. Click [here](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/discussions/435) for more information.
> [!NOTE]
> This release changes how the script saves your last used settings, this means settings saved in the old format will no longer work with this release. You can use the `MigrateSavedSettings.ps1` script provided with this release to migrate your old settings file if desired.
This release includes some significant improvements under the hood, in addition to the changes listed below.
## What's Changed
* Add app removal of specific apps via command-line by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/402
* Add default and last used config files by @Raphire & @soulcloude00  in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/402
* Add all common folders back under 'This PC' in File Explorer by @Raphire in #407
<details>
<summary>Click here for more details</summary>
You can now remove specific apps via the command-line by launching the script with the `-RemoveApps` parameter, and specifying the app(s) in the `-Apps` parameter as a comma separated list. Example: `-RemoveApps -Apps "Microsoft.OneDrive,Microsoft.Copilot"`
If you only use the `-RemoveApps` parameter then it will, like before, remove the default selection of apps as defined in the Appslist.txt file.
Until now the script's defaults were hardcoded in the script. With this release the script now comes with a DefaultSettings.json file allowing you to easily see (and change) what the script does by default. In addition, after running Default Mode, Custom Mode or App Removal Mode your settings will now be saved to LastUsedSettings.json which follows the same JSON format as the DefaultSettings.json file.
Please refer to the [wiki](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/wiki) for more information.
</details>
## New Contributors
* @soulcloude00  made their first contribution in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/362
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/compare/2025.12.16...2025.12.29
<hr/>
[![GitHub Downloads (specific asset, specific tag)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/Raphire/Win11Debloat/2025.12.29/Get.ps1?label=Downloads&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/wiki/How-To-Use)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat release 2025.12.29, app removal of specific apps via command-line is added. Default and last used config files are introduced. All common folders are added back under 'This PC' in File Explorer. Several undocumented parameters are deprecated. Settings saved in the old format are no longer compatible; a migration script is provided.

chunks.title: Release 2026.02.01-R1
chunks.raw_text: Repository: Raphire/Win11Debloat Release: Release 2026.02.01-R1 Tag: 2026.02.01; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-02-01T12:17:54Z; created_at: 2026-02-01T12:12:32Z Release notes: > [!IMPORTANT] > Several undocumented parameters in Win11Debloat have been removed with this release. Click [here](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/discussions/435) for more information. This is a big one, for quite a while people have requested a proper graphical UI for Win11Debloat. Today it's finally here! The new graphical UI will become the new default way to use Win11Debloat, but don't worry, Win11Debloat powerful CLI features are still here. If you choose, you can even access the old CLI menu by launching the script with the `-CLI` parameter. In addition to the new UI, some big changes have been made under the hood, please refer to the changelog below for more details. ## What's Changed * Add full GUI by @Raphire, with help from @SashankBhamidi & @N0tHorizon in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/432 * Update App Selection UI to be in line with new GUI * Move support app definitions from `Appslist.txt` to `Apps.json` and add proper app names and descriptions * Move Feature definitions to `Assets/Features.json` * Add option to apply changes to other users or the default user profile through the GUI. * Add `-CLI` parameter to open CLI menu instead of GUI * Add missing Sysprep registry files for Multi-Monitor taskbar settings * Add option to disable the 'Drag Tray' by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/433 * Add option to disable bloat in Brave browser by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/408 * Add error logging to run.bat by @N0tHorizon in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/437 * Removed deprecated parameters, see https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/discussions/435 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/compare/2025.12.29...2026.02.01
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat release 2026.02.01-R1, a full graphical user interface (GUI) is introduced. App selection UI is updated. App definitions move from Appslist.txt to Apps.json with proper names and descriptions. Feature definitions move to Assets/Features.json. An option to apply changes to other users or the default user profile through the GUI is added. A -CLI parameter opens the CLI menu instead of the GUI. Missing Sysprep registry files for Multi-Monitor taskbar settings are added. Options to disable the 'Drag Tray' and bloat in Brave browser are added. Error logging is added to run.bat. Deprecated parameters are removed.

Repository: Raphire/Win11Debloat Release: Release 2026.02.01-R2 Tag: 2026.02.01-R2; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-02-01T12:49:34Z; created_at: 2026-02-01T12:48:05Z Release notes: > [!IMPORTANT] > Several undocumented parameters in Win11Debloat have been removed with this release. Click [here](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/discussions/435) for more information. This is a big one, for quite a while people have requested a proper graphical UI for Win11Debloat. Today it's finally here! The new graphical UI will become the new default way to use Win11Debloat, but don't worry, Win11Debloat powerful CLI features are still here. If you choose, you can even access the old CLI menu by launching the script with the `-CLI` parameter. This release also includes some new settings, as well as some big changes under the hood, please refer to the changelog below for more details. ## What's Changed * Add full GUI by @Raphire, with help from @SashankBhamidi & @N0tHorizon in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/432 * Update App Selection UI to be in line with new GUI * Move supported app definitions from `Appslist.txt` to `Apps.json` and add proper app names and descriptions * Move Feature definitions to `Assets/Features.json` * Add option to apply changes to other users or the default user profile through the GUI. * Add `-CLI` parameter to open CLI menu instead of GUI * Add missing Sysprep registry files for Multi-Monitor taskbar settings * Add option to disable the 'Drag Tray' by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/433 * Add option to disable bloat in Brave browser by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/408 * Add error logging to run.bat by @N0tHorizon in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/437 * Removed deprecated parameters, see https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/discussions/435 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/compare/2025.12.29...2026.02.01-R2
[![GitHub Downloads (specific asset, specific tag)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/Raphire/Win11Debloat/2026.02.01-R2/Get.ps1?label=Downloads&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/wiki/How-To-Use)

Missing Sysprep registry files for Multi-Monitor taskbar settings are added. Options to disable the 'Drag Tray' and bloat in Brave browser are added. Error logging is added to run.bat. Deprecated parameters are removed.

chunks.title: Release 2026.02.04
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Raphire/Win11Debloat
Release: Release 2026.02.04
Tag: 2026.02.04; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-02-04T13:11:18Z; created_at: 2026-02-04T13:01:04Z
Release notes:
Following our recent update, this release focuses on refining the new Win11Debloat GUI with improved functionality & accessibility, as well as addressing some bugs that were introduced. Additionally, this version introduces a few new options for managing Windows Updates and BitLocker encryption.
## What's Changed
* Improve UI accessibility for screen readers by @makhlwf in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/441
* Add search bar to tweak page by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/440
* Support Ctrl+F for search boxes by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/449
* Respect NoRestartExplorer flag in GUI by @Raphire
* Fix crash on clearing Start menu pinned apps for all users by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/447
* Make GUI resizable by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/448
* Add Windows Update Settings by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/450
* Add option to disable BitLocker automatic device encryption by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/451
## New Contributors
* @makhlwf made their first contribution in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/441
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/compare/2026.02.01-R2...2026.02.04
<hr/>
[![GitHub Downloads (specific asset, specific tag)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/Raphire/Win11Debloat/2026.02.04/Get.ps1?label=Downloads&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/wiki/How-To-Use)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat release 2026.02.04, UI accessibility for screen readers is improved. A search bar is added to the tweak page, with Ctrl+F support. The NoRestartExplorer flag is respected in the GUI. A crash on clearing Start menu pinned apps for all users is fixed. The GUI is made resizable. Windows Update Settings are added. An option to disable BitLocker automatic device encryption is added.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat release 2026.02.07, UI improvements are made to the Overview page. A Windows Explorer restart checkbox replaces the prompt after execution. A key in Enable_Game_Bar_Integration.reg is fixed. Links to the wiki are added next to tweak category headers.

Tag: 2026.02.12; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-02-12T22:21:17Z; created_at: 2026-02-12T22:14:15Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* Fix styling for other user input box by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/459
* Add option to select target user(s) for app removal by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/462
* Add Multi-tasking settings by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/458
- Disable window snapping
- Disable snap suggestions when snapping windows
- Disable Snap Layouts on dragging windows to the top of the screen or when hovering over the maximize button
- Change showing tabs when snapping or pressing Alt+Tab
* Improve DisableEdgeAds feature to disable additional clutter/ads in Microsoft Edge by @Raphire
- Disable the first run experience
- Disable default browser prompts
- Disable Adobe Acrobat buttons/ads
- Disable spotlight experiences and recommendations

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat release 2026.02.12, styling for the other user input box is fixed. An option to select target user(s) for app removal is added. Multi-tasking settings are added, including disabling window snapping, snap suggestions, Snap Layouts, and changing tab showing behavior. The DisableEdgeAds feature is improved to disable additional clutter/ads in Microsoft Edge, including first run experience, default browser prompts, Adobe Acrobat buttons/ads, and spotlight experiences.

chunks.title: Release 2026.03.07
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Raphire/Win11Debloat
Release: Release 2026.03.07
Tag: 2026.03.07; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-07T19:52:21Z; created_at: 2026-03-07T19:42:23Z
Release notes:
> [!NOTE]
> This release includes changes to the default apps and settings. For more information, please refer to [the wiki](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/wiki/Default-Settings).
## What's Changed
* Add option to disable MS Store app results in Windows Search by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/509
* Add option to prevent WSAIFabric service from automatically starting by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/501
* Add option to disable Storage Sense automatic disk cleanup by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/507
* Add option to disable Find My Device location tracking by @CMD126 in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/508
* Add option to disable Search Highlight by @CMD126 in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/508
* Add support for removing additional apps from Microsoft,  Lenovo & Dell by @CMD126 in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/508
* Add warning about some changes requiring a reboot @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/506
* Add warning about removing Edge and its impact on Sandbox by @AnonymousWP in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/491
* Improve & simplify the overview & apply interface by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/505
* Fix Search Icon and Label options by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/504
* Fix focus loss after Explorer restart by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/506
* Updated feature labels & descriptions by @Raphire
## New Contributors
* @AnonymousWP made their first contribution in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/491
* @CMD126 made their first contribution in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/508
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/compare/2026.02.19...2026.03.07
<hr/>
[![GitHub Downloads (specific asset, specific tag)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/Raphire/Win11Debloat/2026.03.07/Get.ps1?label=Downloads&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/wiki/How-To-Use)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat release 2026.03.07, options to disable MS Store app results in Windows Search, prevent WSAIFabric service from automatically starting, disable Storage Sense automatic disk cleanup, disable Find My Device location tracking, and disable Search Highlight are added. Support for removing additional apps from Microsoft, Lenovo & Dell is added. Warnings about changes requiring a reboot and about removing Edge's impact on Sandbox are added. The overview & apply interface is improved and simplified. Search Icon and Label options are fixed. Focus loss after Explorer restart is fixed. Feature labels & descriptions are updated.

chunks.title: Release 2026.03.09
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Raphire/Win11Debloat
Release: Release 2026.03.09
Tag: 2026.03.09; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-09T23:42:08Z; created_at: 2026-03-09T23:39:53Z
Release notes:
> [!NOTE]
> This release changes the (expected) location of all config files to a dedicated `Config` folder. This includes `Features.json`, `DefaultSettings,json`, `Apps.json`, `LastUsedSettings.json` and `CustomAppsList`
> This change only affects people that have downloaded the script locally and made changes to any of these files. If you have, simply copy these files over to the `Config` folder after updating the script.
## What's Changed
*  Fix error with module importing when launching the script from PowerShell 7 by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/514
*  Add option to hide the 'All Apps' section from the start menu by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/514
*  Move all config files to a dedicated `Config` folder by @Raphire  in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/514
*  Replace support button with a `Report a bug` button when script encounters an error when applying changes by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/514
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/compare/2026.03.07...2026.03.09
<hr/>
[![GitHub Downloads (specific asset, specific tag)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/Raphire/Win11Debloat/2026.03.09/Get.ps1?label=Downloads&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/wiki/How-To-Use)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat release 2026.03.09, an error with module importing when launching from PowerShell 7 is fixed. An option to hide the 'All Apps' section from the start menu is added. All config files are moved to a dedicated 'Config' folder. The support button is replaced with a 'Report a bug' button when an error occurs during applying changes.

chunks.title: Release 2026.04.04-R2
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Raphire/Win11Debloat
Release: Release 2026.04.04-R2
Tag: 2026.04.04-R2; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-04T20:36:24Z; created_at: 2026-04-04T20:34:49Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* Add option to export/import settings configuration by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/522
* Add drive letter position and visibility options (#527) by @natanheringer in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/533
* Add support for multiple AppIds for app removal by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/526
* Fix: Skip confirmation when running last used settings with `-Silent` parameter by @Raphire see #521
* Fix inconsistent search highlighting after sorting by @Raphire
* Fix: Close app preset menu when main window loses focus by @Raphire
* Set default launch mode to CLI for deployment-targeted parameters by @Raphire
* Improve registry file import error handling by @Raphire
* Improve Window controls by @Raphire
* Improve user validation by @Raphire
* Improve styling on various UI elements by @Raphire
* Fix: block window resizing beyond min. height/width by @Raphire
## New Contributors
* @natanheringer made their first contribution in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/533
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/compare/2026.03.15...2026.04.04
<hr/>
[![GitHub Downloads (specific asset, specific tag)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/Raphire/Win11Debloat/2026.04.04-R2/Get.ps1?label=Downloads&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/wiki/How-To-Use)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat release 2026.04.04-R2, options to export/import settings configuration and drive letter position and visibility are added. Support for multiple AppIds for app removal is added. Confirmation when running last used settings with -Silent is skipped. Inconsistent search highlighting after sorting is fixed. The app preset menu closes when the main window loses focus. Default launch mode is set to CLI for deployment-targeted parameters. Registry file import error handling, window controls, user validation, and styling on various UI elements are improved. Window resizing beyond min. height/width is blocked.

chunks.title: Release 2026.04.26
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Raphire/Win11Debloat
Release: Release 2026.04.26
Tag: 2026.04.26; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-26T18:31:59Z; created_at: 2026-04-26T18:31:39Z
Release notes:
> [!NOTE]
> This release removes `Disable Fast Startup` from the default settings. For most users, fast startup has more benefits than downsides. Run [this registry file](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/blob/master/Regfiles/Undo/Enable_Fast_Startup.reg) to re-enable fast startup on your system.
## What's Changed
* Manually add system32 to System PATH when it's missing by @Raphire see #548
* Added prompt asking user to run as adminstrator by @David17c in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/556
* Fix full-screen window snapping on secondary monitors by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/557
* Improve app & tweak selection UI by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/558
* This includes new presets to quickly select all settings in the Privacy & Suggested Content and AI categories
* Improve HideOnedrive feature so it also work in Windows 11 by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/559
* This feature hides the `OneDrive` section in the File Explorer navigation pane
* Improve DisableWidgets feature by removing additional apps by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/561
* Add setting details in config import/export interface by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/562
* Remove 'Disable Fast Startup' from default settings by @Raphire
* Update tooltip for BitLocker automatic device encryption feature to clarify behavior by @Raphire
* Add Get-Dev.ps1 launch script for development by @Raphire
* Update regfile encoding for consistency by @Raphire
## New Contributors
* @David17c made their first contribution in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/556
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/compare/2026.04.05...2026.04.26
<hr/>
[![GitHub Downloads (specific asset, specific tag)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/Raphire/Win11Debloat/2026.04.26/Get.ps1?label=Downloads&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/wiki/How-To-Use)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat release 2026.04.26, system32 is manually added to System PATH when missing. A prompt asking the user to run as administrator is added. Full-screen window snapping on secondary monitors is fixed. The app & tweak selection UI is improved with new presets for Privacy & Suggested Content and AI categories. The HideOnedrive feature is improved to work in Windows 11. The DisableWidgets feature is improved by removing additional apps. Setting details are added in the config import/export interface. 'Disable Fast Startup' is removed from default settings. The tooltip for BitLocker automatic device encryption is updated. A Get-Dev.ps1 launch script for development is added. Regfile encoding is updated for consistency.

## What's Changed
* Improve user validation by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/568
* Add System Registry backup & restore by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/566

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat release 2026.05.10, user validation is improved. System Registry backup & restore and Start Menu pinned apps layout backup & restore are added. Tweak columns are made responsive. App removal scope handling & styling are refactored. Feature labels are updated to include Windows default indicators.

Release notes:
This is just a minor release to fix an issue with registry backup creation introduced with release [2026.05.10](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/releases/tag/2026.05.10)
## What's Changed
* Fix capture and restore of signed dword/qword registry values
* Add restart instructions to registry restore success message

Capture and restore of signed dword/qword registry values is fixed. Restart instructions are added to the registry restore success message.

chunks.title: Release 2026.05.20
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Raphire/Win11Debloat
Release: Release 2026.05.20
Tag: 2026.05.20; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-20T14:45:47Z; created_at: 2026-05-20T14:29:41Z
Release notes:
> [!NOTE]
> This release removes the option to disable local search history and the taskbar search highlights as they wouldn't apply properly for some users. Taskbar search highlights can be disabled instead by opting to remove Bing/Copilot integration from Windows search.
## What's Changed
* Fix: Increase System Restore point creation timeout to 90 seconds by @ahmadsh2007 in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/586
* Limit backup restore files to `.json` only by @Raphire
* Add Registry write fall-back in case applying registry file fails by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/592
* Continue on registry failures and show details after execution by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/592
* Remove DisableSearchHighlights and DisableSearchHistory settings by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/592
* Remove widget-related registry changes as they're no longer required for disabling widgets by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/592
* Update tooltip for DisableTelemetry feature to clarify impact on Windows Insider updates by @Raphire in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/592
## New Contributors
* @ahmadsh2007 made their first contribution in https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/pull/586
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/compare/2026.05.11...2026.05.20
<hr/>
[![GitHub Downloads (specific asset, specific tag)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/Raphire/Win11Debloat/2026.05.20/Get.ps1?label=Downloads&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat/wiki/How-To-Use)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat release 2026.05.20, the System Restore point creation timeout is increased to 90 seconds. Backup restore files are limited to .json only. A registry write fall-back is added in case applying a registry file fails. The script continues on registry failures and shows details after execution. DisableSearchHighlights and DisableSearchHistory settings are removed. Widget-related registry changes are removed as they are no longer required. The tooltip for DisableTelemetry is updated to clarify impact on Windows Insider updates.

questions.query_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat releases, which release adds an option to disable AI features in Paint & Notepad?

answer_support.answer_text: an option to disable AI features in Paint & Notepad is introduced

questions.query_text: Across the Raphire/Win11Debloat releases, how does the change related to Microsoft Edge in release 2025.08.16 differ from the change in release 2026.02.12?

options.text: 2025.08.16 adds an option to disable telemetry, ads, MSN news feed, and AI in Edge, while 2026.02.12 improves DisableEdgeAds to disable additional clutter like first run experience and Adobe Acrobat ads.
2025.08.16 removes Edge entirely, while 2026.02.12 adds an option to disable Edge telemetry.
Both releases only update Edge removal logic without adding new options.
2025.08.16 disables Edge AI features, while 2026.02.12 disables Edge shopping assistant.

questions.expected_answer: 2025.08.16 adds an option to disable telemetry, ads, MSN news feed, and AI in Edge, while 2026.02.12 improves DisableEdgeAds to disable additional clutter like first run experience and Adobe Acrobat ads.

answer_support.answer_text: an option to disable telemetry, ads, MSN news feed, and AI in Microsoft Edge is added

The DisableEdgeAds feature is improved to disable additional clutter/ads in Microsoft Edge, including first run experience, default browser prompts, Adobe Acrobat buttons/ads, and spotlight experiences

questions.query_text: In the Raphire/Win11Debloat release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds a full graphical user interface (GUI), (2) a release that adds an option to disable AI features in Paint & Notepad, (3) a release that adds System Registry backup & restore, (4) a release that adds an option to disable BitLocker automatic device encryption.

answer_support.answer_text: an option to disable AI features in Paint & Notepad is introduced
a full graphical user interface (GUI) is introduced
An option to disable BitLocker automatic device encryption is added
System Registry backup & restore and Start Menu pinned apps layout backup & restore are added
